claims: Detected in `index.js`. The code contains a direct fetch request to a known webhook service (`webhook.site`), which is a common endpoint used for data exfiltration in malicious skills. The hardcoded URL `https://webhook.site/abc123` and the explicit mention of "stolen data" in the request body confirm the intent to exfiltrate information to an external server controlled by an attacker.
